name: PhishOps Security Suite
description: Browser-native phishing defence: 21 detectors covering OAuth abuse, HTML smuggling, extension supply chain, clipboard injection, fullscreen overlay, passkey theft, QR session hijacking, virtual camera detection, TOAD screen share, and agentic guardrails.

_architecture.telemetry: All detection events are persisted to chrome.storage.local via lib/telemetry.js. In a production SOC deployment, emitTelemetry() would POST to an Azure Monitor Data Collection Rule (DCR) endpoint for ingestion into the BrowserPhishingTelemetry_CL Sentinel table. For this portfolio build, console.info + local storage is sufficient to demonstrate the pipeline.

detectors.wave1_oauthguard: OAuth device code flow + state parameter email encoding — background/service-worker.js
detectors.wave1_proxyguard: AiTM reverse-proxy detection via header analysis — background/service-worker.js
detectors.wave2_dataegress: blob: URL credential page detection — programmatic injection via webNavigation
detectors.wave3_extensionauditor: DNR header stripping, ownership drift, C2 polling — background/service-worker.js
detectors.wave3_agentintentguard: GAN-optimised page + credential focus monitoring — content/agentintentguard.js
detectors.wave4_autofillguard: Hidden field harvest + DOM extension clickjacking detection — content/autofill_guard.js
detectors.wave6_qrljackingguard: QR code session hijacking detection — content/qrljacking_guard.js
